## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, analytics, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New content workflow: Coffee chats → topic extraction → content creation (1500-word articles + related pieces)](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Looker updates: Uncategorized content categorized, AI content cohorts added, custom clustering to be refined](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Scrunch LLM visibility tool set up to track WebStacks' content performance in AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [WebStacks community launch and upcoming AI for web management session](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Reduce coffee chat articles to \~1500 words for more concise content](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Extract 2-3 topics from each coffee chat for additional content creation](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Integrate new content with existing library through refreshes and interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Aim for 5-6 coffee chat articles per week, adjusting based on length and quality](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [GrowthX to access WebStacks' ClickUp for better content organization and topic tagging](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Weekly content planning: Select coffee chat, extract topics, plan related articles](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Jesse to export WebStacks' existing tag hierarchy for more accurate content categorization in Looker](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

### Analytics Updates

  - [Looker: Uncategorized content now categorized, refreshes every 12 hours](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [AI content cohorts added for tracking performance (e.g., "AI for web dev", "chapters")](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [Custom clustering to be refined based on WebStacks' existing tag hierarchy](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### LLM Visibility Tool Implementation

  - [Scrunch set up to track WebStacks' content performance in AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [Monitors queries, position, sentiment, and citation frequency across various LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [Data population in progress; more insights expected in the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)

### WebStacks Community Initiative

  - [New community launched with Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [Upcoming session on AI for web management, featuring technical CMS insights and content strategy discussion](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [Monthly sessions planned on various topics, providing potential content soundbites](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jesse to export WebStacks' tag hierarchy and send to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Jakub to document new content workflow process and share with team](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [GrowthX to select next coffee chat and propose related content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Jakub to confirm if WebStacks team can be invited to Scrunch tool](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [Team to review first week of Scrunch data in next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/WBoADuU9BRMoF8hXKy-KbJxuGi_csxsb?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
